title: Jacques Dernier
content:
{{CharHub|Jacques Dernier|Jacques Dernier}} {{Character |image = JacquesDernierProfilePic.jpg |real name = Jacques Dernier |alias = {{Alias |nicknames = Frenchie{{Ref|CATFA}} |organizational = Prisoner #03691{{Ref|CAFV7}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|FRAN}} |gender = Male |IDno = 03691 |DOB = [[1911|January 2, 1911]][[:File:SSR files 2.jpg|S.H.I.E.L.D. Files]] |affiliation = {{WPS|French Resistance}}

''[[Spider-Man: Homecoming]]'' (photo)}}}} |tv series = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.]]'' (photo)}}}} |comic = ''[[Captain America: First Vengeance]]''
''[[Captain America: The First Avenger Adaptation]]'' |actor = [[Bruno Ricci]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|Dernier. My people were resisting the Nazi occupiers in [[Marseille]].|Jacques Dernier|Captain America: First Vengeance}} '''Jacques Dernier''' was a member of the {{WPS|French Resistance}} who went on to join the [[Howling Commandos]] during [[World War II]], serving as the team's explosives expert. ==Biography== ===French Resistance=== Living in [[Marseille]], Jacques Dernier joined the {{WPS|French Resistance}} when [[World War II]] began and [[France]] was occupied by [[Germany|German]] forces. Eventually, Dernier was captured by the Germans and sent to work at the [[Hydra]] [[Hydra Base Camp C3|weapons facility]] in the [[Austria|Austrian]] Alps. In [[1943|October 1943]], he met other Allied POWs: [[Bucky Barnes]], [[Dum Dum Dugan]], [[Gabe Jones]], and [[James Montgomery Falsworth]]. With their help, Dernier was able to mix chemicals to corrode machinery and cause an accident that killed [[Lohmer]]. However, Dernier and the others had their rations withheld from them for a week. Dugan provoked a fight with Dernier when he jokingly said that the French never tried to defend [[Paris]] against the Germans.{{Ref|CAFV7}} ===Howling Commando=== [[File:HYDRA Assault Rifle.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dernier escaping from [[Hydra]]'s [[Hydra Base Camp C3|facility]]]] In [[1943|November 1943]], when [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]] single-handedly [[Liberation of Allied Prisoners of War|assaulted]] the facility in which he was prisoner, Dernier, along with his companions, broke free and wreaked havoc on the [[Hydra]] agents. Dernier teamed up with Jim Morita and took a Hydra gun which was powered by the Tesseract; it proved to be incredibly powerful and helped them escape. Dernier joined with the other POW's and eventually arrived back to [[United States Army]] base in [[Italy]]. Shortly after their break-out, Dernier and his comrades were invited to join a [[Howling Commandos|special operations unit]] led by Rogers himself. Dernier, after a brief conversation in French with [[Gabe Jones]], happily accepted. Along with the other Commandos, Dernier took part in many assaults against Hydra, until the end of the [[World War II|War]]. During one assault, Dernier single-handedly destroyed a [[Hydra Mini Tank]] by running into its oncoming path and placing a bomb under its manifold. He stood in the road and watched as it exploded, turning to the other Commandos as if it was easy.{{Ref|CATFA}} ===After the War=== Dernier died after the war, as [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]]'s files given to [[Steve Rogers]] when he awoke in the 21st century report Dernier's status as deceased.{{Ref|TADS}} ==Abilities== *'''Expert Marksman''': Joining the French Resistance, Dernier became proficient in firearms usage. After being freed by [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]. He went on to use this expertise to fight with the [[Howling Commandos]]. *'''Explosives Mastery''': Being considered the explosives expert{{Ref|MSCE}} of the [[Howling Commandos]], Dernier had the ability to single-handedly place a bomb under the manifold of a [[Hydra Mini Tank]] and destroy it. *'''Bilingualism''': Dernier was fluent in his native French, as well as English. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''{{WPS|Sten|Sten MkII SMG}}''': Dernier carried this submachine gun as his weapon of choice, and he used it during the [[Howling Commandos]]' raids on [[Hydra]] facilities. *'''{{WPS|M1 carbine|M1A1 Carbine}}''': Dernier switched his weapon to one of the standard firearms of the [[United States Army]] when he broke through the doors of [[Hydra Headquarters]], as part of the [[Strategic Scientific Reserve]]'s [[Attack on Hydra Headquarters|assault on the base]]. *'''[[Track Bomb]]''': Designed by [[Howard Stark]], Dernier used these bombs to destroy [[Hydra Mini Tank]]s, attaching them under the manifolds of the vehicles. ==Facilities== *'''[[Whip & Fiddle]]''': The Whip & Fiddle was a pub where Dernier often drank. He agreed to join the [[Howling Commandos]] while sitting down at a table. *'''[[Strategic Scientific Reserve Headquarters]]''': In the headquarters, Dernier often created plans with his team to figure out how to tackle [[Hydra]]. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}} {{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *{{WPS|French Resistance}} *[[Howling Commandos]] - Teammates **[[Steve Rogers|Steve Rogers/Captain America]] - Former Leader **[[Bucky Barnes]] **[[Dum Dum Dugan]] **[[Gabe Jones]] **[[Jim Morita]] † **[[James Montgomery Falsworth]] † *[[United States Army]] **[[Chester Phillips]] † *[[Strategic Scientific Reserve]] **[[Peggy Carter]] † {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Hydra]] **[[Red Skull|Johann Schmidt/Red Skull]] **[[Arnim Zola]] † {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|CAFV7}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|CATFA}} **{{Appearance|CATFAA1}} **{{Appearance|CATFAA2}} **{{Appearance|CAFV6}} (concurrent events) **{{Appearance|CAFV8}} (concurrent events) *{{Appearance|CATWS}} (photo) *{{Appearance|AoS211}} (photo) *{{Appearance|SMH}} (photo) ==Trivia== *In the comics, Jacques "Frenchie" Dernier was a member of the {{WPS|French Resistance}} who formed occasional alliances with the [[Howling Commandos]]. ==References== {{Gallery|Jacques Dernier/Gallery}} {{Reflist|1}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Captain America: The First Avenger Characters]] [[Category:Comic Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Hydra Base Camp C3 Inmates]] [[Category:Strategic Scientific Reserve Soldiers]] [[Category:Howling Commandos Members]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]]
